notes: Refers to the faculty of memory or the act of remembrance. 'Zum Gedächtnis' means 'in memory of'.

sentences.german: Er hat ein sehr gutes Gedächtnis für Namen.
sentences.english: He has a very good memory for names.

sentences.german: Die Feier fand zum Gedächtnis der Opfer statt.
sentences.english: The ceremony took place in memory of the victims.
